summary: Comprehensive testing of reveal logic V2 with two triggers: 1) Mutual glance = reveal, 2) Accepted icebreaker = reveal. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified for discovery mode selection, Not Here page with location prompt, radius selectors, and back navigation.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Reveal logic V2 fully implemented and tested. Two reveal triggers: 1) Mutual glance (both users glance at each other), 2) Accepted icebreaker (icebreaker sent + response accepted). Both triggers reveal BOTH users simultaneously. Presence/venue status NEVER triggers reveal. Message button locked until reveal. Discovery cards show Glance and Icebreaker buttons pre-reveal, 'Sent' state when icebreaker sent.
